texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lion in the Sun is a sanctuary of charm and relaxation. Delight in its unique ambiance, unwind by the four saltwater pools, or discover serene corners rich in character.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ACCOMODATION
texts.text: ACCOMODATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Discover unparalleled comfort in our elegant accommodations at Lion in the Sun, designed for a luxurious and restful stay. The rooms range from intimate and cozy spaces to expansive suites, all designed to offer a perfect blend of comfort and elegance.
texts.text: Discover unparalleled comfort in our elegant accommodations at Lion in the Sun, designed for a luxurious and restful stay. The rooms range from intimate and cozy spaces to expansive suites, all designed to offer a perfect blend of comfort and elegance.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BEACH ACCESS
texts.text: BEACH ACCESS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Enjoy the luxury of private beach access at Billionaire Resort, where guests can enjoy exclusive, unhindered entry to pristine shores, perfect for relaxing walks, sunbathing, and water activities in a secluded, tranquil setting.
texts.text: Enjoy the luxury of private beach access at Billionaire Resort, where guests can enjoy exclusive, unhindered entry to pristine shores, perfect for relaxing walks, sunbathing, and water activities in a secluded, tranquil setting.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BAR & RESTAURANT
texts.text: BAR & RESTAURANT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Experience our two distinct restaurants at Billionaire Resort and Retreat. At Lion Restaurant, located within the retreat, enjoy coastal flavors with both à la carte and set menu options for an indulgent culinary experience. Enjoy refreshing beverages and cocktails at our bar, conveniently located near the pool and restaurant, creating the perfect atmosphere for relaxation and socializing.
texts.text: Experience our two distinct restaurants at Billionaire Resort and Retreat. At Lion Restaurant, located within the retreat, enjoy coastal flavors with both à la carte and set menu options for an indulgent culinary experience. Enjoy refreshing beverages and cocktails at our bar, conveniently located near the pool and restaurant, creating the perfect atmosphere for relaxation and socializing.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At our beachfront restaurant in Billionaire Resort, savor delicious cuisine from our à la carte menu with stunning ocean views.
texts.text: At our beachfront restaurant in Billionaire Resort, savor delicious cuisine from our à la carte menu with stunning ocean views.
